caption: A man is seated in a podcast studio, wearing a black t-shirt with "CHECK IT" printed on the front, a black baseball cap with a silver emblem, and over-ear headphones. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone. Behind him is a white wall featuring a logo with stars and the words "EMPIRE HUSTLE" repeated vertically. On the right side of the background, a screen displays partial text and imagery. Overlaid on the scene are graphic elements, including a logo that says "BOSS TALK PODCAST" on the left and the text "BOSS TALK 101" on the right. As the sequence progresses, the man speaks, shifting his head slightly from left to right and adjusting his facial expression. His hand becomes visible in the final frame as he gestures while talking.
